queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating impact of lacking a known savings account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical investigation into how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical assessment of how maintaining critical or multiple existing credit accounts correlates with reduced default likelihood.
